data.text: M01P07, SMALL, VERY DUSTY, CRATERIZED, PRO 0.126.360; PRV
0.001.482.072 /// DUSKY REFLECTIVITY WITH EXTREME AMOUNTS OF DARK
MOTTLING. HAS MANY LARGE AND MEDIUM SIZED CRATERS OF VARYING AGE. ///
AT 266.062, 47.10, IS A TALL ROUND TOP PEAK, WELL ACTUALLY THE TOP
IS IRREGULAR FACETING BUT IT LOOKS ROUND FROM A DISTANCE. HAS A CLOSE
COMPANION OF A LARGE BOULDER. THE PAIR CAN BE SEEN FROM A DISTANCE
IN THIS SECTOR AS IT IS QUITE FLAT GROUND /// SKINNYMON 6011.953.224
